text: Table users(id, name, region). Contains customer details.
Table orders(id, user_id, total_amount, order_date). Stores customer orders.
Table order_items(id, order_id, product_id, quantity, price). Stores items in each order.
Table products(id, name, category_id, price). Product details.
Revenue is calculated as quantity * price from order_items.
Example: Total revenue per user requires joining orders and order_items.
